title: Advisor recommendation — recruit documentation advisor (template=knowledge-advisor)
justification: Project identity is documentation and prompt library; benefits from dedicated writing and content quality review
perceive: RECOMMENDATION (user approval required): recruit a 'documentation' advisor seeded from the hub 'knowledge-advisor' template. Justification: Project identity is documentation and prompt library; benefits from dedicated writing and content quality review APPROVE by setting execution_mode=auto on this lug; DEFER/REJECT by moving it out of open/. Hub templates: /home/mario/projects/wheelwright/hub/WAI-Hub/advisor-templates/. Roster: WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/registry.json. Pattern: WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/archie/context_prompt.md.
execute: 0. GATE: only proceed if the user approved (execution_mode=auto). Otherwise stop.
2. Read WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/registry.json. Reuse a fitting 'new'/'stub' advisor_id in department_id=knowledge, else use a fresh advisor_id (the domain name, e.g. 'documentation').

4. Write WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/<advisor_id>/context_prompt.md adapting the knowledge-advisor charter for domain=documentation (advisor_id, domain, mission, responsibilities, escalation-to-Ozi). Pattern: WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/archie/context_prompt.md.
6. Update WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/registry.json: advisor entry status=stub, department_id=knowledge, domain=documentation, initialized_from_template=knowledge-advisor. Preserve other entries.

7. Update WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/schedule-index.json: if advisor_id absent, append {"advisor_id": "<advisor_id>", "run_cadence": "weekly", "event_triggers": [], "last_run_at": null, "next_recommended_run": null}.

8. Update WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/ozi/scan_state.json: set team_coverage.gaps_detected[domain=documentation].proposal_status=provisioned and the matching recommendations_pending entry to provisioned.
verify: WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/documentation/context_prompt.md exists and is non-empty; WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/documentation/scan_state.json exists with status=stub; registry.json has entry advisor_id=documentation status=stub; schedule-index.json has weekly entry for documentation; ozi/scan_state.json team_coverage.gaps_detected[domain=documentation].proposal_status == 'provisioned'.
acceptance_criteria: schedule-index.json has weekly entry for documentation
